title: Weekly AI Insight Report
description: As a user, I want a weekly AI-generated report that correlates data across all domains (sleep vs mood vs habits vs spending) so I can discover patterns I can't see myself.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-generates every Sunday or on demand
Queries habits, journal mood, health metrics, ledger, routines from past 7 days
Sends cross-domain data to AI with a structured analysis prompt
Renders markdown report with 3-5 actionable insights
Shows correlation highlights (e.g., 'Exercise days had 40% higher mood ratings')
Accessible from Dashboard and as a dedicated page

title: Daily Check-in Flow
description: As a user, I want a 2-minute structured daily check-in with mood rating, AI-generated reflection prompt, and one commitment so I stay engaged every day.
acceptanceCriteria: Quick mood selector (1-5 or emoji scale)
AI generates a context-aware reflection prompt from recent data
User sets one commitment for the day
Check-in saved to journal with 'check-in' tag
Dashboard shows today's check-in status
Takes under 2 minutes to complete

title: Jumpstart Prompts for AI Chat
description: As a user, I want pre-built contextual prompts on the Chat page ('Review my week', 'Help me plan tomorrow', 'What patterns do you see?') so I can start meaningful conversations quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: 5-8 jumpstart prompt buttons above chat input
Prompts are context-aware (pull recent data)
Clicking a prompt sends it as a message
Prompts rotate/update based on time of day and recent activity
Include: review week, plan tomorrow, pattern analysis, goal check-in, motivation boost

title: Proactive AI Nudges (Desktop Notifications)
description: As a user, I want context-aware desktop notifications that celebrate streaks, remind me of routines, and alert me to patterns so the app works for me even when I'm not looking at it.
acceptanceCriteria: Opt-in notification system in Settings
Streak celebrations (e.g., '7-day meditation streak!')
Gentle routine reminders based on usual completion time
Pattern alerts (e.g., 'Sleep dropped below 7h for 3 days')
Uses Tauri notification API
Configurable frequency and quiet hours

title: Goal-Habit Linking with AI Breakdown
description: As a user, I want to link habits to goals and have AI decompose goals into milestones and suggested habits so my daily actions connect to long-term aspirations.
acceptanceCriteria: New migration: goal_milestones table, goal_habits association table
AI breaks a goal into 3-5 milestones with target dates
AI suggests 2-3 habits that support each goal
Goal progress auto-updates from linked habit completion and milestone status
Goal detail page shows linked habits and milestone timeline
Completing all milestones marks goal as completed

title: Wire Todo-Goal Connection
description: As a user, I want todos linked to goals so completing tasks updates goal progress and I can filter todos by goal.
acceptanceCriteria: todos.goal_id is queried and used in the UI
Todo creation allows selecting a parent goal
Todos page has goal filter dropdown
Completing a todo contributes to goal progress calculation
Goal detail page shows linked todos

title: Financial-Goal Bridge
description: As a user, I want to link spending categories to goals and see budget vs actual so my financial tracking supports my growth aspirations.
acceptanceCriteria: Ledger entries can be tagged with a goal
Goal detail page shows financial summary (spent/budgeted)
Monthly spending by goal-category breakdown
AI insight can reference financial-goal connections

title: Emotion Analysis on Journal Entries
description: As a user, I want automatic emotion detection on my journal entries so I get richer mood trends without manually rating every entry.
acceptanceCriteria: Run emotion classification model (DistilBERT via ort crate) on journal save
Detect: joy, sadness, anger, fear, surprise, neutral
Store emotion label + confidence in journal_entries table
Show emotion badge on journal list cards
Emotion trend chart on Journal page (sparkline over 30 days)
Works offline (model bundled, ~70MB quantized)

title: Voice Journaling with Local Transcription
description: As a user, I want to speak my journal entries and have them transcribed locally so I can journal faster and more naturally.
acceptanceCriteria: Record button on Journal page
Local speech-to-text via whisper.cpp (whisper-cpp-plus crate)
Uses Whisper tiny/base model (~75-150MB)
Transcription saved as journal entry text
Audio recording optionally saved alongside text
Works fully offline
Supports English (extensible to other languages)

title: Future Self Digital Twin Chat
description: As a user, I want to chat with an AI-simulated future version of myself (based on my current goals, habits, and data) to explore consequences of my choices.
acceptanceCriteria: New Chat mode: 'Talk to Future You'
AI persona generated from user's goals, habits, values, and projected outcomes
Conversation feels like talking to an older, wiser version of yourself
Persona updates as user data changes
Grounded in user's actual data, not generic advice
Clear disclaimer that this is a simulation

title: Spaced Repetition for Growth Items
description: As a user, I want past journal entries, goal reflections, and insights resurfaced at optimal intervals so I retain and build on my self-knowledge.
acceptanceCriteria: Use fsrs-rs crate for scheduling
Any item (journal entry, goal, skill, learning note) can become a review item
Daily check-in surfaces 1-3 items for review
User rates recall/relevance (easy/good/hard/again)
Schedule adapts based on ratings
Review history tracked in SQLite

title: Life Balance Radar Chart
description: As a user, I want a Wheel of Life radar chart on my dashboard computed from actual tracked data across all domains so I can see my balance at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Radar chart with spokes: Health, Habits, Skills, Learning, Goals, Finances, Journal/Mindfulness
Each spoke scored 0-100 from actual data (not subjective ratings)
Health: from health_metrics aggregation
Habits: from completion rate last 30 days
Skills: from current_level / target_level ratio
Learning: from active/completed learning items
Goals: from goal status distribution
Finances: from budget adherence (if set)
Journal: from entry frequency and mood trend
Uses Recharts (already installed)
Show 30-day overlay to visualize balance shifts

title: Mood-Habit Correlation View
description: As a user, I want to see which habits most strongly correlate with my positive mood days so I know what actually makes me feel better.
acceptanceCriteria: Dedicated analytics page or section in Dashboard
Correlate habit completion with journal mood ratings
Show ranked list of habits by positive mood correlation
Scatter plot: habit completion days vs mood score
Requires minimum 14 days of data to show results
Updates weekly or on demand

title: Identity-Based Habit Framing
description: As a user, I want to attach an identity statement to each habit ('I'm becoming someone who reads daily') so my habits feel connected to who I want to be.
acceptanceCriteria: Add identity_statement field to habits table
Habit creation form prompts: 'I'm becoming someone who...'
Identity statement displayed on habit cards
AI coach references identity statements when discussing habits
Optional — can be left blank

title: Harden CI Quality Gates
description: As a developer, I want cargo fmt, cargo test, and ESLint added to CI so formatting, Rust tests, and JS lint are enforced.
acceptanceCriteria: CI runs cargo fmt -- --check
CI runs cargo test
CI runs ESLint (if configured) or add basic eslint config
All checks must pass for CI to be green
Pre-push hook updated to match CI checks

title: Portable Git Hooks Setup Script
description: As a developer, I want a setup script that installs git hooks from a tracked directory so new clones automatically get quality gates.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/setup-hooks.sh
Store hook source files in .githooks/ (tracked in repo)
Script copies hooks to .git/hooks/ (or uses git config core.hooksPath)
Document in README and CLAUDE.md
Works for submodule setup (git/modules path)

title: Code Splitting for Bundle Size
description: As a developer, I want lazy-loaded routes so the main JS bundle drops below 500KB.
acceptanceCriteria: React.lazy + Suspense for page components
Main chunk under 500KB
Loading indicator during lazy load
No user-visible performance regression
